narrative:
Walnut-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,073 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
